meta.title: CYNA — Technical Design
meta.description: Interactive technical documentation for the CYNA cybersecurity e-commerce platform

landing.title: CYNA
landing.subtitle: Cybersecurity e-commerce platform
landing.description: Technical architecture and design record. An interactive companion to explore every decision, flow and structural pattern behind the CYNA platform.

security.title: Defense in depth
security.desc: 4 security layers — Nginx, Gateway, APIs, PostgreSQL — with mandatory 2FA for the back-office.

architecture.title: Distributed modular monolith
architecture.desc: 4 independent NestJS APIs behind a single Gateway, orchestrated with Docker Compose.

payments.title: Secure Stripe payments
payments.desc: PCI-DSS delegated to Stripe. One-off and recurring payments confirmed via signed webhooks.

search.title: Elasticsearch search
search.desc: BM25 scoring, facets, PostgreSQL fallback. Catalog searchable in under 200 ms.
